chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 447 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 08.11.2024 On 25.10.2024 the following order was passed;- “None appeared on behalf of the applicant nor any intimation received. Instant Criminal Misc. Application is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution, however, in the interest of justice adjourned to 08.11.2024 with intimation notice to counsel for the applicant.” Today neither applicant nor his Counsel turned up to pursue the instant criminal miscellaneous application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge ARBROHI
